questions.question: Describe the primary function of morphological operators in feature extraction, particularly in the context of image processing.
questions.hint: Provide a brief overview of morphological operators and their role in feature extraction

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using morphological image processing techniques for feature extraction, especially in the context of object detection?
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits of morphological techniques for feature extraction

questions.question: How does the choice of morphological operator (e.g., erosion, dilation, opening, closing) impact the feature extraction process, and what factors should be considered when selecting an operator?
questions.hint: Explain the impact of operator choice on feature extraction and provide guidance on selecting an appropriate operator
